variables.name: sgtDbMssql
variables.description: SQL Server connection for the database tests. Point it at a scratch database — tests create and drop their own session-named tables.

variables.name: sgtDbPg
variables.description: PostgreSQL connection for the database tests. Scratch database only.

variables.name: sgtDbMysql
variables.description: MySQL connection for the database tests. Scratch database only.

variables.name: sgtOdbcMssql
variables.description: Full DSN-less ODBC connection string for SQL Server (requires the Microsoft ODBC driver installed locally).

variables.name: sgtSharePoint
variables.description: SharePoint Online connection (Microsoft Entra app registration) pointed at a dedicated TEST site — the tests create and delete lists, items, files, and folders on it. Certificate auth unlocks the SP-REST-backed actions; client-secret-only covers the Graph-backed ones.

variables.name: sgtMailGraph
variables.description: Microsoft 365 / Graph mail connection (app registration with Mail permissions) for the Graph email tests. Use a dedicated test mailbox.

variables.name: sgtMailGraphUpn
variables.description: UPN (email address) of the Graph test mailbox — must match the mailbox sgtMailGraph points at.

variables.name: sgtMailGraphBulkFolderId
variables.description: Graph folder ID of a staging folder in the test mailbox used by the folder-scoped bulk-delete leg. Graph addresses custom folders by ID, not display name. Create a folder (e.g. 'bot-tests-bulk') and look up its ID via Graph Explorer.

variables.name: sgtMailAccount
variables.description: Address of a DEDICATED IMAP/SMTP test mailbox. The tests send mail to it, move messages, flag them, and DELETE them — never point this at a personal or production inbox.

variables.name: sgtMailPassword
variables.description: App password for the test mailbox (e.g. a Gmail app password). Never a real account password.

variables.name: sgtMailImapHost
variables.description: IMAP host of the test mailbox.

variables.name: sgtMailSmtpHost
variables.description: SMTP host of the test mailbox.

variables.name: sgtAiOpenAi
variables.description: OpenAI credential for the AI tests, as a JSON payload. The tests make a handful of small completions per run (pennies of usage).

variables.name: sgtAiOllama
variables.description: Local Ollama credential for the AI tests, as a JSON payload. Optional — only needed if you want the local-model legs.

variables.name: sgtHostedPrintDir
variables.description: Windows folder the tier-3 Excel print-to-file test writes its PDF into. Windows + desktop Excel only.

variables.name: sgtPathToken
variables.description: Fixture value for the shared-variable mechanics test (int-11). Not a credential — keep the pre-filled value.
